PriceFeed","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"renounceOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"betId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"resolveBet","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256[]","name":"betIds","type":"uint256[]"}],"name":"resolveBets","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"p","type":"bool"}],"name":"setPaused","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"priceFeed_","type":"address"}],"name":"setPriceFeed","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"token","type":"address"},{"internalType":"bool","name":"active","type":"bool"}],"name":"setTokenActive","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"token","type":"address"}],"name":"shareNAV","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"name":"tokenConfigs","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"active","type":"bool"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"annualVolBps","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tickSizeUsdc","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"bucketSeconds","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"houseEdgeBps","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"minBetUsdc","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"maxBetUsdc","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint8","name":"gridWidth","type":"uint8"},{"internalType":"uint8","name":"gridHalfHeight","type":"uint8"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"openBoostBps","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"closeBoostBps","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"afterHoursBps","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"name":"totalPoolShares","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newOwner","type":"address"}],"name":"transferOwnership","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"usdc","outputs":[{"internalType":"contract IERC20","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"name":"usdcCollected","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"token","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"shares","type":"uint256"}],"name":"withdrawLiquidity","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"token","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"withdrawUsdc","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"kind":"dev","methods":{"depositLiquidity(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Tokens to deposit (18 dec).","token":"xStock ERC-20 address."}},"getGridMatrix(address)":{"params":{"token":"xStocks ERC-20."},"returns":{"currentPrice":"Current spot price (6-dec USDC).","multipliers":" [row][col] array. Row 0 = top (furthest up). x100 scale.","prices":"      Target price per row (6-dec USDC)."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"placeBet(address,int8,uint8,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"xStock tokens to wager (18 dec).","priceTicks":"Row offset: positive = up, negative = down. Non-zero.","timeBuckets":"Column (1 = nearest bucket, up to gridWidth).","token":"xStocks ERC-20 address."}},"placeBetWithUSDC(address,int8,uint8,uint256)":{"params":{"priceTicks":"Row offset: positive = up, negative = down. Non-zero.","timeBuckets":"Column (1 = nearest bucket, up to gridWidth).","token":"xStocks ERC-20 to play on.","usdcAmount":"USDC to wager (6 dec)."}},"previewMultiplier(address,int8,uint8)":{"params":{"priceTicks":"Signed row offset.","timeBuckets":"Column offset.","token":"xStocks ERC-20 address."},"returns":{"multiplier":"         Payout multiplier x100 (e.g. 250 = 2.5x).","payout100USDC":"      Payout for a $100 USDC bet (6 dec).","probability":"        Implied probability (PRECISION = 1e18 = 100%).","targetPrice":"        Price level to touch (6-dec USDC)."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner."},"withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256)":{"params":{"shares":"LP shares to burn.","token":"xStock ERC-20 address."}}},"stateVariables":{"SCALE":{"details":"token(18dec) * price(6dec) / SCALE = usdc(6dec)"}},"title":"xStocksGrid","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"claimMultiple(uint256[])":{"notice":"Batch claim multiple winning bets in one transaction."},"claimWinnings(uint256)":{"notice":"Claim xStock token winnings for a resolved winning bet.         Works for both token bets and USDC bets \u2014 winner always receives xStock tokens."},"depositLiquidity(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit xStock tokens into the LP pool and receive pool shares.         LPs earn house edge revenue \u2014 their share NAV grows as bets are lost."},"freeBalance(address)":{"notice":"Free xStock token balance available for new bets (not locked for payouts)."},"getBetStatus(uint256)":{"notice":"Bet status and potential payout details."},"getGridMatrix(address)":{"notice":"Get the full grid multiplier matrix for a token (for frontend rendering)."},"placeBet(address,int8,uint8,uint256)":{"notice":"Bet with xStock tokens directly (e.g. 0.5 xAAPL).         Win => receive xStock tokens x multiplier from the pool."},"placeBetWithUSDC(address,int8,uint8,uint256)":{"notice":"Bet with USDC \u2014 no xStock tokens required to play.         USDC is converted to xStock token-equivalent at spot price.         Win => receive xStock tokens x multiplier from the pool.         Lose => USDC stays in usdcCollected for admin to replenish pool."},"previewMultiplier(address,int8,uint8)":{"notice":"Preview the multiplier and probability for a grid cell (no gas)."},"resolveBet(uint256)":{"notice":"Resolve a single bet after its bucket closes.         Uses TOUCH semantics: wins if price HIGH (for up bets) or LOW (for down bets)         ever reached targetPrice during the bucket window.         Callable by anyone once the backend has pushed resolution data."},"resolveBets(uint256[])":{"notice":"Batch resolve multiple bets in one transaction.         Skips bets that cannot yet be resolved."},"shareNAV(address)":{"notice":"NAV per LP share in token units (18 dec)."},"withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Burn LP shares and receive proportional xStock tokens."},"withdrawUsdc(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw USDC accumulated from losing USDC bets."}},"notice":"Grid-based prediction market for xStocks tokenized equities. \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  HOW THE GRID WORKS \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  A 2D matrix anchored to the current price:       T+1    T+2    T+3    T+4    T+5  +5   x1.8   x2.2   x2.8   x3.5   x4.2  +4   x1.6   x2.0   x2.5   x3.1   x3.8  +3   x1.4   x1.8   x2.2   x2.7   x3.3  [0]  \u2500 CURRENT PRICE \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  -3   x1.4   x1.8   x2.2   x2.7   x3.3  ...  Each cell = \"will xAAPL price TOUCH this level before bucket T+N closes?\"  TOUCH semantics: bet wins if price's HIGH/LOW ever reached the target  during the bucket \u2014 NOT just the end-of-bucket close price. \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  TWO WAYS TO ENTER \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  1. placeBet()          \u2014 bet xStock tokens directly (e.g. 0.5 xAAPL)  2. placeBetWithUSDC()  \u2014 bet USDC; converted to token-equivalent at spot  In both cases the WIN payout is always in xStock tokens.  Win 3x on xAAPL \u2192 receive 3x xAAPL tokens from the LP pool. \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  LIQUIDITY POOL \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  LPs deposit xStock tokens to back the house and earn a share of the  house edge on every losing bet.  shares minted = amount * totalShares / poolBalance  (proportional)  redeemable value = shares / totalShares * poolBalance  Losing bets:  tokens stay in pool  \u2192 pool grows \u2192 share NAV increases  Winning bets: tokens paid from pool \u2192 pool shrinks \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  PRICES / MATH \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  All prices are 6-decimal USDC (e.g. 190_240_000 = $190.24).  Multipliers use GBM / normal-CDF via GridMath library.  SCALE = 1e18: tokenAmount(18dec) * price(6dec) / 1e18 = returns.multipliers: [row][col] array. Row 0 = top (furthest up). x100 scale.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.priceTicks: Row offset: positive = up, negative = down. Non-zero.
params.timeBuckets: Column (1 = nearest bucket, up to gridWidth).

params.priceTicks: Row offset: positive = up, negative = down. Non-zero.
params.timeBuckets: Column (1 = nearest bucket, up to gridWidth).

returns.payout100USDC: Payout for a $100 USDC bet (6 dec).

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claimMultiple(uint256[]).notice: Batch claim multiple winning bets in one transaction.

claimWinnings(uint256).notice: Claim xStock token winnings for a resolved winning bet.         Works for both token bets and USDC bets — winner always receives xStock tokens.

depositLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Deposit xStock tokens into the LP pool and receive pool shares.         LPs earn house edge revenue — their share NAV grows as bets are lost.

freeBalance(address).notice: Free xStock token balance available for new bets (not locked for payouts).

getBetStatus(uint256).notice: Bet status and potential payout details.

getGridMatrix(address).notice: Get the full grid multiplier matrix for a token (for frontend rendering).

placeBet(address,int8,uint8,uint256).notice: Bet with xStock tokens directly (e.g. 0.5 xAAPL).         Win => receive xStock tokens x multiplier from the pool.

placeBetWithUSDC(address,int8,uint8,uint.notice: Bet with USDC — no xStock tokens required to play.         USDC is converted to xStock token-equivalent at spot price.         Win => receive xStock tokens x multiplier from the pool.         Lose => USDC stays in usdcCollected for admin to replenish pool.

previewMultiplier(address,int8,uint8).notice: Preview the multiplier and probability for a grid cell (no gas).

resolveBet(uint256).notice: Resolve a single bet after its bucket closes.         Uses TOUCH semantics: wins if price HIGH (for up bets) or LOW (for down bets)         ever reached targetPrice during the bucket window.         Callable by anyone once the backend has pushed resolution data.

resolveBets(uint256[]).notice: Batch resolve multiple bets in one transaction.         Skips bets that cannot yet be resolved.

shareNAV(address).notice: NAV per LP share in token units (18 dec).

withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Burn LP shares and receive proportional xStock tokens.

withdrawUsdc(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw USDC accumulated from losing USDC bets.
